bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIME, description VARCHAR(255));
SELECT event_time FROM test_table WHERE HOUR(event_time) = 12 AND MINUTE(event_time) = 34;
SELECT event_time FROM test_table WHERE HOUR(event_time) IS NULL OR MINUTE(event_time) IS NULL;
